languages.original_text: "The procession on deck awash with such bright colours, though it consisted of lowly rabble. The contrast seems unusual and even... beautiful. Will my paints be able to convey it?"

languages.text: "Шествие на палубе было окрашено столь яркими цветами, хоть и состояло из безродной черни. Этот контраст кажется необычным и даже... красивым. Смогут ли передать его мои краски?"
"The procession on deck awash with such bright colours, though it consisted of lowly rabble. The contrast seems unusual and even... beautiful. Will my paints be able to convey it?"
languages.original_text: "Шествие на палубе было окрашено столь яркими цветами, хоть и состояло из безродной черни. Этот контраст кажется необычным и даже... красивым. Смогут ли передать его мои краски?"

traits.locale_text: "The procession on deck awash with such bright colours, though it consisted of lowly rabble. The contrast seems unusual and even... beautiful. Will my paints be able to convey it?"
"The procession on deck awash with such bright colours, though it consisted of lowly rabble. The contrast seems unusual and even... beautiful. Will my paints be able to convey it?"
"The procession on deck awash with such bright colours, though it consisted of lowly rabble. The contrast seems unusual and even... beautiful. Will my paints be able to convey it?"

languages.text: 「デッキに広がる、鮮やかな色の行列。それは、卑しいクズの集まりだった。その対比は、奇妙で、美しくさえ見える。私の絵で、それを表現できるだろうか？」
languages.original_text: "The procession on deck awash with such bright colours, though it consisted of lowly rabble. The contrast seems unusual and even... beautiful. Will my paints be able to convey it?"

traits.locale_text: 「デッキに広がる、鮮やかな色の行列。それは、卑しいrabbleの集まりだった。その対比は、奇妙で、美しくさえ見える。私の絵で、それを表現できるだろうか？」

languages.text: « La procession inonde le pont de couleurs incroyablement vives, alors qu'elle est constituée de gens du commun. Ce contraste inhabituel a une certaine... beauté. Serai-je capable de le reproduire ? »
languages.original_text: "The procession on deck awash with such bright colours, though it consisted of lowly rabble. The contrast seems unusual and even... beautiful. Will my paints be able to convey it?"

traits.locale_text: « La procession inonde le pont de couleurs incroyablement vives, alors qu'elle est constituée de gens du commun. Ce contraste inhabituel a une certaine... beauté. Serai-je capable de le reproduire ? »

languages.text: "Die Prozession an Deck ist ausgesprochen farbenfroh, wenn man bedenkt, dass sie nur aus niederem Gesindel besteht. Der Kontrast ist ungewöhnlich und trotzdem ... schön. Ob ihn meine Bilder wohl erfassen können?"
languages.original_text: "The procession on deck awash with such bright colours, though it consisted of lowly rabble. The contrast seems unusual and even... beautiful. Will my paints be able to convey it?"

traits.locale_text: "Die Prozession an Deck ist ausgesprochen farbenfroh, wenn man bedenkt, dass sie nur aus niederem Gesindel besteht. Der Kontrast ist ungewöhnlich und trotzdem ... schön. Ob ihn meine Bilder wohl erfassen können?"

languages.text: "Güvertedeki tören alayı, adi ayaktakımından oluşsa da çok parlak renkler saçmaktaydı. Kontrast olağan dışı ve hatta... Güzel denebilir. Boyalarım bunu aktarabilecek mi?"
languages.original_text: "The procession on deck awash with such bright colours, though it consisted of lowly rabble. The contrast seems unusual and even... beautiful. Will my paints be able to convey it?"

traits.locale_text: "Güvertedeki tören alayı, adi ayaktakımından oluşsa da çok parlak renkler saçmaktaydı. Kontrast olağan dışı ve hatta... Güzel denebilir. Boyalarım bunu aktarabilecek mi?"

languages.text: «La procesión ha inundado la cubierta de colores muy vivos, aunque todos eran vulgares plebeyos. El contraste se me antoja inusual... incluso bello. ¿Serán mis óleos capaces de plasmarlo?».
languages.original_text: "The procession on deck awash with such bright colours, though it consisted of lowly rabble. The contrast seems unusual and even... beautiful. Will my paints be able to convey it?"

traits.locale_text: «La procesión ha inundado la cubierta de colores muy vivos, aunque todos eran vulgares plebeyos. El contraste se me antoja inusual... incluso bello. ¿Serán mis óleos capaces de plasmarlo?».

languages.text: “甲板上的游行队伍沐浴在鲜艳的色彩之中，尽管参与者皆是卑微的贱民。这种强烈的对比令人感到怪异，但是……竟有几分美丽。我的颜料能够描绘出这一切吗？”
languages.original_text: "The procession on deck awash with such bright colours, though it consisted of lowly rabble. The contrast seems unusual and even... beautiful. Will my paints be able to convey it?"

traits.locale_text: “甲板上的游行队伍沐浴在鲜艳的色彩之中，尽管参与者皆是卑微的贱民。这种强烈的对比令人感到怪异，但是……竟有几分美丽。我的颜料能够描绘出这一切吗？”
